paragraphs.text: A working list of museums, publishers, theatres and studios I've had the privilege of designing alongside. Some are long-term identity stewardships; others are one-off catalogues or campaign collaborations.
Cover design programme, fiction imprint — ongoing since 2018
Annual visual identity and poster series — 2020, 2022, 2023
